'''nazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacillatingly|vacillatingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacillatingly|vacillatingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nazate|nazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nazatesher|nazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazatesherĂ«m|nazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazatero|nazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nazateshĂ«|nazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazateshĂ«m|nazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazatero|gokinazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinazateshĂ«|gokinazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazateshĂ«m|gokinazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonazankerom|gonazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonazankeshĂ«|gonazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazankeshĂ«m|gonazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonazankeya|gonazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazaterom|nazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazatemu|nazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nazateya|nazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazaterom|gokinazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazatemu|gokinazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinazateya|gokinazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nazazate|nazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nazazatesher|nazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazazatesherĂ«m|nazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazazatero|nazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nazazateshĂ«|nazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazazateshĂ«m|nazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazazatero|gokinazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinazazateshĂ«|gokinazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazazateshĂ«m|gokinazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonazazankerom|gonazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonazazankeshĂ«|gonazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazazankeshĂ«m|gonazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonazazankeya|gonazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazazaterom|nazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazazatemu|nazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nazazateya|nazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazazaterom|gokinazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazazatemu|gokinazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinazazateya|gokinazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠte|nĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠtesher|nĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠtero|nĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠtero|gokinĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠterom|nĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠtemu|nĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠzĂŠteya|nĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠterom|gokinĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzĂŠteya|gokinĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafzafte|nafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafzaftesher|nafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzaftesherĂ«m|nafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafzaftero|nafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafzafteshĂ«|nafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzafteshĂ«m|nafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafzaftero|gokinafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafzafteshĂ«|gokinafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafzafteshĂ«m|gokinafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafzafnkerom|gonafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafzafnkeshĂ«|gonafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafzafnkeshĂ«m|gonafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafzafnkeya|gonafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafzafterom|nafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzaftemu|nafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafzafteya|nafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafzafterom|gokinafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafzaftemu|gokinafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafzafteya|gokinafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
